rows.name: Bad Type Club
rows.og_description: Bad Type Club is an experimental type foundry established in 2017. The foundry specializes in creating innovative and unconventional typefaces, often drawing inspiration from historical and obscure sources. Some of their work revives lost type foundries, meticulously reconstructing digital versions from fragmented and decaying specimens. Other projects feature abstract and obscured designs, resulting in unique, displaced typefaces that challenge traditional aesthetics. Additionally, Bad Type Club produces fonts tailored for practical use, blending creativity with functionality.

rows.name: Ek Type
rows.og_description: Letterbox India is an initiative by the type designers at Ek Type, where they sketch and explore Indic letterforms at chai time. It’s a fun activity where they explore themes, typecookers and scripts. The explorations lead to multiple outcomes - from casual lettering to entire typefaces. Designers use multiple tools and since the time is limited to 15-20 minutes, the explorations start out fresh and rough. The chosen few lettering pieces are then fleshed out by either digitisation or by refining the handmade sketch. This is what you view on the letterbox page!

rows.name: EpiType
rows.og_description: A prelude, a worksite, half cooked type from the drawers. At EPI (formerly know as Space Type Lab) we introduce incomplete typefaces to the world. Their drawing might have originated through our own typographical endeavours and their level of development may vary. One day they may grow up and be offered through a proper type foundry or not, but so far you can check them out here. If you are interested in using them and / or if you are missing anything like characters, alphabets, alterations or a whole new typeface please get in touch with us. We always welcome a good occasion to improve and extend our typefaces.

rows.name: Parachute
rows.og_description: Dear friends, welcome to our new website. This is Parachute 3.0! Ever since our first appearance on the internet 5 years ago and almost 12 years after we landed as a professional type foundry, we continue our dedication to creating sophisticated, real, unpretentious, contemporary, but most of all useful corporate typefaces. Typefaces that help you build stronger brands and communicate better. We are delighted to offer our services to some of the most innovative designers and companies worldwide. Take your time to become familiar with our custom work and find out all this information you missed about us in the past few years. Once again welcome and hope you enjoy our new website!
